## What changed

Describe the problem and the user-visible outcome.

## Verification

- [ ] `make format-check`
- [ ] Relevant Swift tests pass
- [ ] `make verify` passes, or the omitted checks are explained below
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot or recording
- [ ] Documentation and third-party notices are updated when needed

## Risk

Call out changes to storage, networking, permissions, signing, model behavior,
metadata, dependencies, or user data. Write “None” if none apply.
